clEntries.8.5.24: v8.5.22: Added support for soil sensor `_TZE284_0ints6wl` / TS0601 (requested by community), 122 new device fingerprints synced from Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, and community contributions (JohanBendz), Fixed auto-off timer trigger not firing correctly, Fixed button triple click trigger not working, Fixed overload detection trigger
clEntries.8.5.22: v8.5.22: 122 new fingerprints from community sync. New devices: soil sensor (_TZE284_0ints6wl). Bug fixes: auto-off timer, button triple click, overload, and radio presence triggers now work correctly.

clEntries.8.1.13: v8.1.12: Fixed crash in DeviceIdentificationDatabase that could cause app instability during device lookup., Added 298 new fingerprints from Z2M, ZHA, community reports, and JohanBendz contributions., Total: 413 drivers, 3296 fingerprints validated., rain_sensor: capability handling update.
clEntries.8.1.12: v8.1.12 — 298 new fingerprints added, DeviceIdentificationDatabase crash fix, 413 drivers, 3296 FPs validated.
clEntries.8.1.11: Bug fix: air purifier smoke and siren flow cards no longer crash on init. 298 new fingerprints added across drivers.
